title: Inevitable Paper Teddy Bear Head Plates, 21 x 23 cm, Set of 6
features: Novelty Design: These charming paper plates feature a whimsical teddy bear head design, perfect for children's parties or themed events.
Dimensions: Each plate measures approximately 21 x 23 cm, providing ample space for food and snacks.
Disposable and Practical: Made from paper, these plates are disposable and easy to clean up after use, saving you time and effort.
Convenient Pack Size: Each pack contains 6 plates, ensuring you have enough for small gatherings or festivities.
description: Celebrate your little one's special day with these delightful teddy bear head paper plates! Featuring an adorable bear face design with a party hat, these plates are perfect for creating a festive and whimsical atmosphere. Measuring approximately 21 x 23 cm, these sturdy paper plates offer ample space for serving delicious treats and snacks. Whether you're hosting a birthday bash or a playful picnic, these charming plates are sure to delight both kids and adults alike. With a mix of colours available, you can easily coordinate them with your party theme or decor. Convenient and disposable, these plates make clean-up a breeze, allowing you to focus on creating lasting memories with your loved ones. Bring a touch of joy and playfulness to your celebrations with these delightful teddy bear head paper plates.
